intent_pattern: Find outliers anomalies standard deviation z-score isolation forest
golden_instruction: To isolate high-risk anomalies natively via a sandbox or SQL: First compute the population statistics using standard aggregates. For advanced multivariate outliers, use an IsolationForest with a contamination hyperparameter of 0.05. Always map features to transaction_amount and merchant_risk_score. Return a clean visualization using Plotly showing the decision boundaries.

intent_pattern: Calculate average value aggregates across database tables natively
golden_instruction: When executing native relational mathematical aggregation on the fraud table, always explicitly target the transaction_amount column. Wrap the query in standard SQLite AVG() functionality and explicitly group by merchant_id to catch high-velocity spikes.
